body: Amara, thanks for the quick turnaround on the term sheet feedback — I know the holidays make everyone's calendar a mess. I wanted to follow up on our earlier conversation about [Meridian Grid](companies/meridian-grid) and whether [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) would have appetite to co-lead the seed round alongside us. We've been doing more diligence on their grid-balancing software and the numbers on curtailment reduction are honestly stronger than I expected for a team at this stage. Let me know if it makes sense to set up a call with the founders before the break — I think there's a real window here to move before a couple of other funds come back from the holidays with fresh mandates. Happy to share our internal memo if that would help move things along on your end.
